tagline: Building scalable web applications, automation systems, and AI-powered solutions for businesses and startups.
description: Open to software development, full-stack engineering, and startup opportunities.

roles.detailed: Founder @ Orvix Labs | Building AI-Powered Products

bio: Computer Science student and aspiring Full-Stack Developer with a strong passion for web development, coding, and entrepreneurship. Currently studying at NIAT Hyderabad and pursuing a B.Sc. in Computer Science through BITS Pilani. Focused on building modern web applications, creating innovative solutions, and transforming education through story-based learning. Enthusiastic about JavaScript, Python, HTML, CSS, React, and AI-powered technologies, with the goal of becoming a successful software engineer and entrepreneur.

bullets: Founded Orvix Labs and built multiple web applications and digital solutions.
Designed and developed responsive websites with modern UI/UX.
Created hostel management, restaurant management, and automation platforms.
Integrated Firebase authentication, payment gateways, and cloud deployment.
Focused on scalable solutions and user-friendly experiences.
experience.desc: Founded Orvix Labs and led development of web applications, management systems, and digital products with modern UI/UX and cloud deployments.

bullets: Led entrepreneurship initiatives and organized innovation activities.
Mentored students on startup ideas and web development projects.
Collaborated with teams to transform ideas into real-world solutions.
experience.desc: Leading entrepreneurship initiatives, mentoring students on startup ideas, and fostering a culture of innovation and product building at NIAT Hyderabad.

bullets: Developed custom management systems and business websites.
Built dashboard interfaces and automation workflows.
Deployed projects on Vercel and managed version control using GitHub.
Worked on responsive designs optimized for desktop and mobile devices.
experience.desc: Building custom web applications, dashboards, and automation workflows for clients with responsive design and cloud deployment.
